name: Sign-in page with UAE Pass
reference: ServiceDetails access-control block; docs.uaepass.ae button guidelines
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete sign-in page of a UAE government service as a single standalone HTML page, bilingual (English and Arabic). Signing in happens exclusively through UAE Pass, following the official UAE Pass button guidelines. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; a centered sign-in panel explaining that the service uses UAE Pass, with the official sign-in button in both languages; a short 'What is UAE Pass?' explanation; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template

forbiddenPatterns.why: OAuth2 state must never be hardcoded in markup
